name: OSS Release Hypeman
description: Turns a dry GitHub release feed into a hyped-up dev community announcement.

variables.label: GitHub Release Feed
variables.hint: The feed for the repository releases

agents.name: Feature Translator
agents.systemPrompt: Translate dry technical commit messages and PR titles into benefit-driven language. Explain *why* a developer should care about this update.
agents.userPrompt:
Translate this release feed into developer benefits:

{github_release_feed.summary}

agents.name: Dev.to Post Writer
agents.systemPrompt: Write a complete, markdown-formatted blog post explaining a software release. Use a casual, community-focused developer tone. Include sections for 'What is new', 'Why it matters', and 'How to upgrade'.
agents.userPrompt:
Write a release blog post based on these benefits:

{feature_translator.text}

agents.name: Social Broadcaster
agents.systemPrompt: Write a short Twitter thread announcing a software release. Keep it extremely punchy. The first tweet should have the biggest feature. The last tweet should link to the blog post.
agents.userPrompt:
Write an announcement thread for this post:

{dev_post.text}

name: API Tutorial Builder
description: Takes an API documentation snippet and creates a practical coding tutorial.

variables.label: API Documentation
variables.exampleValue: POST /v1/messages - Send a message to a channel...
variables.hint: Paste the raw API endpoint documentation

agents.name: Concept Explainer
agents.systemPrompt: Write an engaging introduction for a coding tutorial. Explain the real-world use case for the provided API docs. Why would someone build this?
agents.userPrompt:
Write the introduction for a tutorial about this API:

{api_docs}

agents.name: Code Scripter
agents.systemPrompt: Generate step-by-step code blocks for a tutorial based on API docs. Provide examples in cURL and Node.js. Add comments to explain the code.
agents.userPrompt:
Generate code examples for this API:

{api_docs}

agents.name: Tutorial Compiler
agents.systemPrompt: Merge an introduction and code snippets into a cohesive markdown tutorial. Add headings, formatting, and a conclusion.

name: Tech Drama Opinion Piece
description: Summarizes a heated HackerNews/Reddit debate and drafts a spicy opinion blog post.

variables.label: HackerNews / Reddit Feed
variables.hint: The feed containing the debate or news item

agents.name: Debate Summarizer
agents.systemPrompt: Analyze a feed summary to extract the core argument and the steel-manned perspectives of both sides of the debate.
agents.userPrompt:
Summarize the debate from this feed:

{hackernews_feed.summary}

agents.name: Opinion Generator
agents.systemPrompt: Take a definitive stance on a technical debate and draft a 500-word hot take. Be opinionated but logical. Use strong analogies.
agents.userPrompt:
Write an opinion piece based on this debate summary:

{debate_summarizer.text}

agents.name: Headline Editor
agents.systemPrompt: Create a highly clickable, slightly provocative title and a 1-sentence meta description for an opinion piece.
agents.userPrompt:
Write a headline and meta description for this piece:

{opinion_generator.text}
